title: refactor(frontend-main): dedupe PlayGenerator blocks and drop dead fallbacks
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Reuse the `imageParams` memo instead of rebuilding URLSearchParams inline in `handleGenerate`
- Extract one `runGeneration(fetchFn, onSuccess, label)` helper for the three near-identical try/catch generation branches
- Pass the already-computed `currentModel` to PlayGenerator instead of three model arrays it re-derives
- Drop the unread `error` field from `useNews` and the unreachable linkedin/twitter.json fallbacks in `useDiaryData`

Verified non-breaking: biome clean, affected tests green vs the main baseline. Net −100 lines.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Trimming the hedges
gist.blurb: We've swept up some dead code and simplified the PlayGenerator logic. A cleaner codebase means faster updates for the hive!
gist.summary: Refactored PlayGenerator to deduplicate generation logic and removed unreachable fallbacks in useDiaryData, resulting in a net reduction of 100 lines of code.
gist.impact: Developers will benefit from a cleaner, more maintainable frontend codebase without any changes to the user experience.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee doing some spring cleaning, sweeping up dead leaves (representing dead code) around a healthy, glowing code-plant.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny bandana, sweeping up fallen brown pixelated leaves around a glowing lime green (#ecf874) code-plant.
